meaning: adv.蛟ｼ蠕怜ｰ頑噴蝨ｰ,菴馴擇蝨ｰ
examples: He was therefore honourably received, and a special dwelling was assigned him.
You did not win very honourably.
First, ask yourself if you are acting honourably.
The minister added that the firm had behaved "very honourably" in its dealings with the government.
Elvis Presley and Johnny Cash are among the singers to have been honourably discharged.
